# Extensions.IdsMatch method

Compares two extension identifiers octet-for-octet, applying NO case folding (spec R-24.2-g).

```csharp
public static bool IdsMatch(string a, string b)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| a | The first identifier. |
| b | The second identifier. |

## Return Value

`true` only when the strings are byte-identical.
